elements.text:
A dead television flickers awake. Static. A single tungsten lamp hums.
On the dusty floor: an unopened Liquid Death tallboy can, alone in shadow.
Locked-off frame. Mock-VHS chromatic aberration, scanlines, slow zoom.

Pull tight on the can. Condensation slides down matte black aluminum.
The white chiseled metal-band wordmark catches the lamp. A drop falls.
Locked-off frame. Same scanlines, same tungsten key. Frame jitter.

Pitch black. The can rises into a hard tungsten side-light, levitating.
Slow rotation. Smoke at the base. Chromatic aberration tighter now.
Locked-off frame. Same VHS register, deeper shadow.

Black. White Liquid Death wordmark stamps in with a single tom hit.
Beneath it, the line punches up: MURDER YOUR THIRST.
Scanlines hold. Frame jitter. Tape warble.
